⛳ This Father’s Day (June 21st), let Dad show off his above-average putting skills for FREE at Gary’s! 💪

📍 Fun for the whole fam

🕶️ Bonus points if Dad wears socks with sandals

#funatgarys #freeminigolf #fathersday #dads #fathersdayfun
Come to Gary’s BEFORE we’re about to close! 🍦🍨 LOLOL #funatgarys #fyp #summerfun #viral #smallbusiness

🌭It’s Jiffy Pup Wednesday at Gary’s! 🎉

Stop by the restaurant today and treat yourself to one of our delicious Jiffy Pups — the perfect summer favorite! ☀️

Bring your family, grab some great food, and enjoy a fun day at Gary’s! We can’t wait to serve you. 😄

Who’s coming for a Jiffy today? 👀
Picture credit: @brittaroundtown 
#funatgarys #JiffyPup #FoodieFavorites #SummerEats #FamilyFun

🚨 NOW OPEN 🚨

The Zip-Line at Gary’s Family Resort is officially OPEN for the season! 🌲☀️

Come soar through the air and add some extra adventure to your summer!

🕐 Zip-Line Hours: Sunday–Friday | 1 PM – 6 PM

Bring your friends, family, and your sense of adventure! 

We can’t wait to see you out there. 🎉

Visit us online for more information:
garysfamilyresort.com

#funatgarys #SummerFun #FamilyAdventure #ZiplineAdventure #vacationmode
